content.en:
Subsequently.

The Lord of the Void Cave said goodbye to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian didn't care about the Lord of the Void, whether he went to the land of eternity or not had nothing to do with him.

This time, the information he gave to the Lord of the Cave Void was also based on the past feelings.

Later, there was also the Bone Transformation Realm that wanted to get information from Ye Tian, but Ye Tian refused one by one.

After all, it has nothing to do with him, and he won't give information in vain.

......

Eternal Ancient Demon City.

Ye Tian left here, ready to get some more gold water from the other side.

After all, he didn't have the golden water on the other side now, and the speed of refining the immeasurable bones was too slow, if he cultivated step by step, hundreds of thousands of primeval epochs would not be able to quench all the immeasurable bones in his whole body to the extreme of the four bone transformation realms.

This time.

Ye Tian's target was not the Eternal Blood Bird, because after the last incident, the Eternal Blood Bird's guard on the other side of the Golden Water had been strengthened.

Although the Eternal Blood Bird Clan doesn't attach much importance to the ancient well on the other side, they won't ignore it, and they don't want the golden water on the other side to be robbed!

"Attack the Eternal Great Apes!"

Ye Tian decided.

The strength of the Eternal Great Ape Clan is not as strong as that of the Eternal Blood Bird Clan, but it is also very powerful.

Ye Tian used the same method, first killed an Eternal Giant Ape, and then mixed into the Eternal Giant Ape Clan, preparing to take the opportunity to snatch the Golden Water on the other side of the Eternal Giant Ape Clan.

However.

When he infiltrated the Eternal Great Ape Clan, he discovered that the upper echelons of the Eternal Great Ape Clan were executing a big plan.

......

The Eternal Great Apes.

The six-headed Eight-Moment Bone Transformation Realm Eternal Giant Ape was summoning other Eternal Giant Apes, and Ye Tian was naturally summoned as well.

He stood here with a bewildered expression, not knowing what was going on at first.

When tens of thousands of Bone Transformation Realm Eternal Giant Ape were summoned, he knew that the Eternal Great Ape Clan had made a big move.

"I'm just here to snatch the gold water from the other side!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He didn't even know where the ancient well on the other side of the Eternal Great Ape Clan was, so he could only give up on snatching the gold water on the other side for the time being.

"Let's see what the Eternal Great Ape Clan is going to do!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Time passes slowly.

After a while, the six Eternal Giant Apes of the Eight Bone Transformation Realm felt that the time was almost up, so they left the clan with a group of Bone Transformation Realm Eternal Giant Apes, leaving only a few Eternal Giant Apes stationed here.

"The powerhouses of the Eternal Great Ape are gone!"

Ye Tian had an idea.

He immediately copied another Eternal Great Ape copy body, and came to the Eternal Great Ape Land again.

However, he communicated with the other Eternal Great Apes stationed here.

Although their intelligence is not high, they still have a clear understanding of the location of the ancient wells on the other side, and they also know where they are.

After finding out the location of the ancient well on the other side, he immediately went to the place where the ancient well on the other side was located.

......

Here, he saw an ancient well on the other side, and only a few Eternal Giant Apes were stationed here.

Obviously.

What the Eternal Great Ape Clan has to do now is far more important than the ancient well on the other side.

"The Eternal Giant Ape stationed here, the most powerful is only six Bone Transformation Realms, and there is no threat to me!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Thereupon.

He made a copy of his real body, and shot directly.

Rumble!!!!

The Eternal Giant Ape of the Sixth Bone Transformation Realm saw Ye Tian break into this place and directly attacked, and the other Eternal Giant Apes also took action.

However.

Their strength is too weak to be his opponent at all.

"Ancient God Demon Spear!"

"Kill!"

Puff puff!!!

One Eternal Great Ape was easily slaughtered by him.

In the blink of an eye, the Eternal Great Apes here have been killed.

Then, he came to the ancient well on the other side.

"There is still a lot of gold water on the other side, although it is not as much as the last time, but it can be enough for a while!"

He immediately took all the gold water from the other side of the place, and then quickly fled.

However.

Throughout, the Eternal Great Apes didn't care about the retreat.

Since the large army of the Eternal Great Ape Clan set out, they have not sent the strong back to deal with things.

After a period of hurrying.

Finally, the Eternal Great Apes have reached their destination.

And this place is far away from the land of the Eternal Great Ape Clan.

"When we finally arrive at our destination, we will immediately know what the Eternal Great Ape Clan is going to do!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

At this time, they came to a black sea.

As soon as the Eternal Giant Apes stepped into this black sea area, black tentacles drilled out of the black sea area, wanting to kill the Eternal Great Apes.

Rumble!!!

The Eternal Giant Ape of the Eight Bone Transformation Realm struck out, shattering the countless tentacles with a single punch.

Immediately afterward, it went straight into the depths of the Black Sea.

Thundered!!!

Fluctuations in the battle were heard from the bottom of the sea.

Not long after, one by one, the strange-looking Bone Transformation Realm monsters were killed by the Eternal Giant Ape of the Eight Bone Transformation Realms and thrown out.

"Megaphage!"

This is the name obtained by Ye Tian's copying and probing.

The strength of this giant devouring beast is not bad, each of them has the strength of five or six bone transformation realms, but when encountering the Eternal Giant Ape of eight bone transformation realms, it is naturally far from being an opponent.

I have to say that these giant phagophers are looking for trouble with the Eternal Giant Ape Clan, or they are still attacking the large army, and they are really looking for death!

After the Eternal Giant Ape of the Eight Bone Transformation Realm killed a group of Giant Devourers, the remaining Giant Devourers hid one by one and did not dare to move, otherwise the remaining Giant Devourers would also die.

Subsequently.

The Great Ape army continued to advance.

Soon, they came to a huge island in the Black Sea.

Here, Ye Tian saw a black giant mountain, this huge mountain had countless holes, and a black hurricane blew out, which looked extremely weird.

Abrupt.

The six-headed eight-stage bone transformation realm Eternal Giant Ape waved his hand and released countless messages, each of which was integrated into the Eternal Giant Ape one by one, letting the Eternal Giant Ape know what the purpose of this time was.

Ye Tian naturally received the news.

"Pick a hole at random, and there's a chance in it!"

After receiving the information, he finally understood what the Eternal Great Ape was going to do.

It seems that it was the Eternal Giant Ape Clan who discovered a treasure land here, and it should be that every Bone Transformation Realm can only enter once, so these six Eternal Giant Apes of the Eighth Bone Transformation Realm have brought almost the entire Bone Transformation Realm of the entire race over, just to let them farm resources here.

Entering it one by one, as long as a small number of them get a great opportunity, it is enough to make the strength of the entire Eternal Giant Ape Clan skyrocket!
